_meta.description: Specification for the hidden verification sheet embedded in all Excel form templates downloaded from the QMS portal. Used to verify authenticity and track the download-to-upload lifecycle of offline forms.

fields.description: Form code from form_control_registry (e.g. FRM-631)
Revision number of the form template at time of download
Server-side UTC timestamp when the file was generated/downloaded
User ID (email or employee code) of the person who downloaded the form
SHA-256 hash of concatenated components for tamper detection. SERVER_SALT is a secret value stored server-side only.
Fixed identifier confirming the file was generated by HESEM QMS system
UUID linking this download to the allocation record in allocation_rules
Regex pattern the uploaded filename must match for acceptance
Maximum allowed file size in MB for upload
Whether macro-enabled (.xlsm) uploads are accepted
Checksum of the original controlled blank template
Formal record number allocated by the system before download
User account that requested the download package
Server timestamp when the issuance package was generated
Current lifecycle status mirrored from the allocation ledger
Latest received version stored by the system
Serialized governed master data context bound at issuance time
Serialized receipt history summary for quick verification
Latest server-side normalized filename
Timestamp of the latest accepted upload

upload_verification_steps: 3. Recompute SHA-256 hash from stored components + SERVER_SALT
4. Compare recomputed hash with download_hash in A5
5. Verify allocation_id exists and status is 'downloaded', 'submitted', or 'received'
8. If all pass: accept upload, update allocation status
9. If any fail: reject upload, log failure reason

upload_log_columns.description: Server-side UTC timestamp of each upload attempt
Sequential version number (1, 2, 3...) incremented on each resubmit
SharePoint or blob storage path where the file was saved
SHA-256 hash of the entire uploaded file for integrity

error_codes.VERIFY_SHEET_MISSING: The _QMS_VERIFY sheet was not found. File may not have been downloaded from QMS portal.
error_codes.HASH_MISMATCH: Download hash verification failed. File may have been tampered with or re-saved outside the system.
error_codes.ORIGIN_INVALID: System origin does not match HESEM-QMS-v3. File may be from a different system.
error_codes.ALLOCATION_NOT_FOUND: Allocation ID not found in the system. The allocation may have been voided.
error_codes.ALLOCATION_WRONG_STATE: Allocation is not in a state that accepts uploads (must be form_downloaded or submitted).
error_codes.FILENAME_MISMATCH: Uploaded filename does not match the expected pattern.
error_codes.FILE_TOO_LARGE: Uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size.
error_codes.MACRO_DETECTED: File contains macros but allowed_macros is false.
